name: @harness/guardrail-log
description: ISSUE-060 — the guardrail_log sink + no-silent-failure invariant + approval/anomaly learning loops (C6 FR-6.LOG.001-004 / FR-6.FMM.001 / FR-6.OPT.001-002). The append-only five-type security-event store every C6 slice writes into: the guardrail_type five-value enum, the hard_limit!=approved check constraint, the injection_quarantine shadow-retain table, the append-only forward-transition trigger, the fail-CLOSED guarded write path (a guardrail that cannot write halts, never proceeds silently — #3), and the admin-confirmed tier/baseline learning candidates that persist rather than vanish. Port + in-memory fake reference model (the offline proof of every invariant the DB enforces); supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the 0009_guardrails DDL — NOT run live (the trigger/check-constraint live proof is results/issue-060-capstone.sql, owed to the Stage-3 checkpoint).
